title: benoicanthus gruicollis var. angustifolia
intro: Benoicanthus gruicollis var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved benoicanthus, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Benoicanthus gruicollis var. angustifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
